certificate.moduleName: Oracle Linux 9 Kernel Crypto API Cryptographic Module
certificate.caveat: When operated in approved mode. The module generates random strings whose strengths are modified by available entropy.
certificate.description: The Oracle Linux 9 Kernel Crypto API provides a C language API for use by other (kernel space and user space) processes that require cryptographic functionality

Tested and Vendor Affirmed Module Version and Identification

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Oracle Linux 9 Kernel CPU Time Jitter RNG Entropy Source

extraColumns.Operational Environment: Oracle Linux 9 on KVM on Oracle Linux 8 on Oracle SERVER X9-2c; Oracle Linux 9 on KVM on Oracle Linux 8 on ORACLE SERVER E4-2c

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: AES key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: AES key used for encryption, decryption, and computing MAC tags.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Encryption with AES Decryption with AES Authenticated encryption with AES

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: HMAC key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.use: Message authentication Key wrapping Key unwrapping

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Entropy input
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Entropy input used to seed the DRBGs. Compliant with IG D.L.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG seed
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: DRBG seed derived from entropy input. Compliant with IG D.L.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: CTR_DRBG: 128, 192, 256 bits; Hash_DRBG: 128, 256 bits; HMAC_DRBG: 128, 256 bits - CTR_DRBG: 128, 192, 256 bits; Hash_DRBG: 128, 256 bits; HMAC_DRBG: 128, 256 bits

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG Internal state (V, Key)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Internal state of CTR_DRBG and HMAC_DRBG instances. Compliant with IG D.L.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: CTR_DRBG: 128, 192, 256 bits; HMAC_DRBG: 128, 256 bits - CTR_DRBG: 128, 192, 256 bits; HMAC_DRBG: 128, 256 bits

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DRBG Internal state (V, C)
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Internal state of Hash_DRBG instances. Compliant with IG D.L.

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Intermediate Key Generation Value
sensitiveSecurityParameters.description: Temporary value generated during Key Pair Generation services.
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192, P-256, P-384 - 112- 200 bits

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DH remote public key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 - 112-200 bits

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DH private key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 - 112-200 bits

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: Shared secret
sensitiveSecurityParameters.strength: ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 - 112-200 bits

extraColumns.Storage Duration: Until cipher handled is freed or module powered off
Until cipher handled is freed or module powered off

From DRBG instantiation until DRBG termination

sensitiveSecurityParameters.name: DH remote public key
sensitiveSecurityParameters.input: API input parameters; AF_ALG_type sockets (input) API output parameters; AF_ALG type sockets (output)

extraColumns.Storage Duration: Until cipher handled is freed or module powered off

sensitiveSecurityParameters.input: API input parameters; AF_ALG_type sockets (input) API output parameters; AF_ALG type sockets (output)

extraColumns.Storage Duration: Until cipher handled is freed or module powered off

sensitiveSecurityParameters.input: API input parameters; AF_ALG_type sockets (input) API output parameters; AF_ALG type sockets (output)

services.name: Non- approved mode
services.description: Automatically entered whenever a non-approved service is requested.
services.indicator: No service indicator required for non-approved services per IG 2.4.C

services.name: RSA with PKCS#1 v1.5 padding
services.approvedFunctions: Signature generation (pre-hashed message); Signature verification (pre-hashed message)

services.name: KAS-FFC-SSC
services.properties: Keys:ffdhe2048, ffdhe3072, ffdhe4096, ffdhe6144, ffdhe8192 bit keys with 112-200 bits of key strength Compliance:Compliant with IG D.F scenario 2(1)

services.name: Encryption with AES
services.properties: Key size(s):128, 192, 256 bits (XTS mode 128 and 256 bits only)

services.name: Decryption with AES
services.properties: Key size(s):128, 192, 256 bits (XTS mode 128 and 256 bits only)

services.name: Hashing
services.properties: SHA-1:N/A SHA2-224:N/A SHA2-256:N/A SHA2-384:N/A SHA2-512:N/A SHA3-224:N/A SHA3-256:N/A SHA3-384:N/A SHA3-512:N/A

services.name: Message authentication
services.description: Compute a MAC tag for authentication
services.properties: HMAC key size(s):112- 524288 bits (112-256 bits) AES key size(s):128, 192, 256 bits

services.name: Random number generation with DRBGs
services.properties: Counter DRBG:128, 192, 256 bits HMAC DRBG:128, 256 bits Hash DRBG:128, 256 bits

services.name: Signature verification with RSA
services.properties: Padding:PKCS#1 v1.5 Hashes:SHA1, SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA- 512 Key size(s):2048, 3072, 4096 bits (112, 128, 150 bits)

services.name: Authenticated encryption with AES
services.description: Encrypt and authenticate a plaintext with AES

services.name: Authenticated decryption with AES
services.description: Decrypt and authenticate a ciphertext with AES

services.name: Key wrapping
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - AES key: W,E - HMAC key: W,E
services.input: AES key, key to be wrapped

services.name: Key unwrapping
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - AES key: W,E - HMAC key: W,E
services.input: AES key, key to be unwrapped

services.name: Authenticated encryption
services.indicator: For all modes except AES GCM: crypto_aead_setkey returns 0; For AES GCM: crypto_aead_get_flags(tfm) has the CRYPTO_TFM_ FIPS_COMPLIANCE flag set

services.name: Authenticated decryption
services.indicator: For all modes except AES GCM: crypto_aead_setkey returns 0; For AES GCM: crypto_aead_get_flags(tfm) has the CRYPTO_TFM_ FIPS_COMPLIANCE flag set

services.name: Message authentication
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - AES key: W,E - HMAC key: W,E
services.input: AES: AES key, message; HMAC: HMAC key, message

services.name: Shared Secret Computation
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - DH private key: W,E - DH remote public key: W,E - Shared secret: G,R
services.input: DH private key, DH remote public key

services.name: Key Pair Generation
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - DH private key: G,R - DH remote public key: G,R - Intermediate
services.output: DH private key, DH remote public key

services.name: Random number generation
services.cspsAccessed: Crypto Officer - Entropy input: W,E - DRBG seed: G,E - DRBG Internal state (V, Key): G,E - DRBG Internal state (V, C): G,E

services.name: Compression
services.description: Compress data (deflate, lz4, lz4hc, lzo, zlibdeflate, zstd)

services.name: Generic system call
services.description: Use the kernel to perform various non- cryptographic operations

services.name: Show version
services.description: Return the module name and version information

services.name: Self-test
services.description: Perform the CASTs and integrity tests
services.approvedFunctions: Encryption with AES Decryption with AES Hashing Message authentication Random number generation with DRBGs Signature verification with RSA Authenticated encryption with AES Authenticated decryption with AES KAS-FFC-SSC

services.name: AES GCM external IV encryption
services.description: Encrypt a plaintext using AES GCM with an external IV

services.name: Key derivation
services.description: Derive a key from a key-derivation key or a shared secret

services.name: Password-based key derivation
services.description: Derive a key from a password

services.name: RSA encryption primitive
services.description: Compute the raw RSA encryption of a plaintext

services.name: RSA decryption primitive
services.description: Compute the raw RSA decryption of a cipertext

services.name: RSA signature generation (pre-hashed message)
services.description: Generate a digital signature for a pre-hashed message

services.name: RSA signature verification (pre-hashed message)
services.description: Verify a digital signature for a pre-hashed message

services.name: API output parameters; AF_ALG type sockets (output)
Error State
services.description: The Linux kernel immediately stops executing

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API data input parameters, AF_ALG type sockets
portsAndInterfaces.name: N/A

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API output parameters, AF_ALG type sockets
portsAndInterfaces.name: N/A

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API function calls, API control input parameters, AF_ALG type sockets, kernel command line
portsAndInterfaces.name: N/A

portsAndInterfaces.dataThatPasses: API return values, AF_ALG type sockets, kernel logs
portsAndInterfaces.name: N/A

Temporary storage for SSPs used by the module as part of service execution
API output parameters; AF_ALG type sockets (output)
Zeroizes the SSPs contained within the cipher handle
Memory occupied by SSPs is overwritten with zeroes, which renders the SSP values irretrievable. The completion of the zeroization routine indicates that the zeroization procedure succeeded.

By calling the appropriate zeroization functions: AES key: crypto_free_skcipher and crypto_free_aead; HMAC key: crypto_free_shash and crypto_free_ahash; DRBG internal state: crypto_free_rng; DRBG seed: crypto_free_rng; Entropy input string: crypto_free_rng; DH remote public & private key: crypto_free_kpp
De-allocates the volatile memory used to store SSPs

Volatile memory used by the module is overwritten within nanoseconds when power is removed. Module power off indicates that the zeroization procedure succeeded. The successful removal of power implicitly indicates that the zeroization is complete.
